name: qa-radar
description: Scanner de qualidade para detectar erros JavaScript, HTTP e de rede em aplicações web.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/accessibility.test.ts tests/cli.test.ts tests/history.test.ts tests/job-queue.test.ts tests/journey.test.ts tests/lighthouse.test.ts tests/quality.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/reporters.test.ts tests/scanner-events.test.ts tests/scanner-evidence.test.ts tests/schema.test.ts tests/server.test.ts tests/sitemap.test.ts tests/web-page.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx --test tests/journey-runner.integration.test.ts tests/scanner.integration.test.ts tests/suite.integration.test.ts tests/web.integration.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
